cards.name: 4 of Cups
cards.interpretation: apathy, contemplation, feeling disconnected, melancholy, boredom, indifference, discontent

cards.name: Ⅶ The Chariot, reversed
cards.interpretation: forceful, no direction, no control, powerless, aggression, obstacles

cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.interpretation: love, new feelings, emotional awakening, creativity, spirituality, intuition
